si.t: Contract Review correct (simplified version or Contract Review checklist, see selection in EvalPlan)
All standards and PPP (for process) are listed and correct
Summary includes all requirements according the PPP
Log fits to revision in footer
All files are in the correct folders on sharepoint, no files missing, no duplicate files, no outdated files
Was reviewer authorized as reviewer in competency matrix at the date of signature?
Document name is correct, Document is a PDF
Signed by project handler and reviewer
Correct Test Lab, Client, project handler, project no. on title page?
Eval Plan is signed by a person who was TC at the time they signed it.

[Germany only] Contract Review is signed by a person who was TC at the time they signed it or is in the list of CR eligible persons at https://tuevsued.sharepoint.com/sites/PS/CTO/CRT/CRT3/Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?RootFolder=%2Fsites%2FPS%2FCTO%2FCRT%2FCRT3%2FDocuments%2FAuthorization%20Center%2FTechnical%20Certifiers&FolderCTID=0x012000A4053A98C4D5994D8185AA4E33C62CBC&View=%7BF06EAF72%2DB7D6%2D4D34%2DAA97%2D90AFA4214098%7D
Initial version for cyber security certs
Eval-Plan is signed before the project handler started with the assessment (e.g. before kick-off-meeting, before first documents from the applicant have been received)
Technical Report check (Repeat for each TR)
Product description is consistent with the user manual
Trade Mark belongs to the cert holder. If not, the authorization letter shall be provided.
Product model is consistent in the TDS, TRF and self-declaration/Einfo/IXIT
Application form, Contract Review, Eval-Plan, Reports, User Manual, Product photos, and Test Data Sheet, MEQ are all in digidoc

r.t: The difference letter exists to explain the differences between each models

si.t: Correct page numbers, and attachment page numbers.
Spot-Check on requirements (Passed, Failed, Deviations, Not applicable = need reason)
App versions, firmware version in TDS consistence with TRF.
Technical information is consistent in the TDS, TRF and self-declaration/Einfo/IXIT
Applied standard is appropriate for the intended use of the product
The product model/s listed in the cert are consistent with the Test report.
The applied standard is valid in CBW
All sites have the correct address
Correct template from Roxtra is used
All techinical parameters listed in the cert are consistent with the Test report
Was PH authorized as PH in competency matrix at the date of signature?
Spot-Check on requirements, the verdict in the "Verdict Table" is consistent with the related provision
Spot-Check on requirements, the evidence of the testing table is provided and appropriate.
Raw data are put in the correct file folder and sufficient.
Reference documentation are put in the correct file folder and sufficient.
Authorized test engineer and project handler and signed.
Test start date is later than the date of the contact review
Spot-Check on requirements, Test method in the testing table are appropriate and no missing test according to the requirement.
